result.summary: Verified visual-effects-03 implementation: 49/49 tasks complete, 6/6 specs covered, 3 non-blocking warnings (GW ripple fade propagation, particle trail color uniformity, temperature-to-color in JS vs shader). All design decisions D1-D5 followed. Ready for archive.
acceptance_evidence: All code verified against specs: GW ripples in LensingPass.js (GL+WebGPU), merger flash in PostProcessor.js, particle trails in TrailRenderer.js, phase indicator in PhaseIndicator.js, timeline scrubber in PhysicsEngine.js+TimeControl.js, temperature attribute in ParticleRenderer.js. Tasks.md all checked. Design.md decisions D1-D5 followed.
